name: Fococcia Bread/Pizza Dough
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the yeast in the tepid water.
2. Add sugar, olive oil, salad oil, and table salt to the yeast mixture.
3. Mix in 3 cups of flour and whisk until the dough begins to leave the sides of the mixing bowl (about 10 minutes).
4. Mix in the remaining flour by hand or with a dough hook and knead until smooth.
5. Allow the dough to rise twice, right in the bowl, and punch down after each rising.
6. Either freeze at this point or roll out into two pizza rounds.
7. Place on a pizza tray and rub with garlic.
8. Add toppings and bake at 450 degrees for 10-15 minutes, checking when done.
